parameters.name: transaction_hash
parameters.description: Transactions are commands that modify the ledger state and consist of one or more operations.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: A number that points to a specific location in a collection of responses and is pulled from the paging_token value of a record.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: A designation of the order in which records should appear. Options include `asc` (ascending) or `desc` (descending). If this argument isn’t set, it defaults to `asc`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records returned. The limit can range from 1 to 200 - an upper limit that is hardcoded in Horizon for performance reasons. If this argument isn’t designated, it defaults to 10.
